subtasks.description: Extract all party names, their roles (e.g., buyer, seller, vendor, service provider), and contact addresses from the multi-party contract document

plan.cost_rationale: This is a single document extraction task with straightforward field mapping (party name, role, contact address). No multi-source reconciliation, no complex inference across multiple documents, and no policy evaluation required. A small tier agent is sufficient for this explicit schema extraction task. One subtask is needed because all three fields (names, roles, addresses) can be extracted in a single pass by the extract specialist.
